XYPN COMPLIANCE
Compliance with Confidence
From registering your RIA to updating your annual ADV and all the ongoing consulting in between. Your team of experts is with you every step of the way.
RIA Registration Guide →
IN-HOUSE COMPLIANCE EXPERTS
RIA compliance solutions:
just a click away
We hear it every day: compliance feels overwhelming for independent financial advisors. That’s why we've prioritized an expert team in-house for you to rely on.
Our Compliance team is ready to assist you with your state or SEC RIA registration, annual ADV updates, regulatory exam prep, and so much more. Do you just have a quick compliance question? No problem–there are multiple opportunities for Q&A each week through regular office hours and our members-only forums. Rest easy knowing your RIA compliance consultants are just a click away.
You can serve as your own Chief Compliance Officer. Take it from an RIA compliance company.
What's included in XYPN Membership?
Annual ADV update
Smartria compliance and task management software
Weekly office hours with our expert Compliance team
Access to members-only compliance forum
Compliance education via webinars and XYPN academy
How-to guides and templates
Get Help With Your Compliance →
XYPN Members on Compliance
“Thank you for all your help and expertise these last six months. With the help of the program, we were able to: make sure we were compliant when changing our company name, get registered in a new state, update our ADV documents and client agreements to match the work we actually do for clients, gain a much deeper understanding of our compliance manual and all the compliance tasks we need to stay on top of, and get an actionable plan in place to stay on top of compliance. I will highly recommend this RIA compliance service to other XYPN members.”
Ben Wacek, CFP®, CKA®
GUIDE FINANCIAL PLANNING, LLC
Compliance for New Firms
Get comprehensive compliance solutions to successfully launch your RIA
RIA Registration
$3,500
When you choose RIA Registration, our compliance experts will lead the way, solving registration complexities for you and supporting you at critical points in your firm registration process.
Start Today →
To utilize XYPN for RIA Registration Services, you will need to sign a Member Agreement agreeing to be a member for 12 months.
MONTHLY PAYMENT OPTION AVAILABLE
Registration Support
Form ADV & U4 Drafting and Submission
Client Agreements & Privacy Policy Drafting
Weekly Compliance Drop-In Group Calls
Core Policies and Procedure Development
Compliance Manual
Creation of Additional Required State Documents for Firm Registration
Business Continuity Manual, Security Manual, and Code of Ethics Creation
ADV Amendment Filing Within 30 Days of Firm Approval
Support with Regulator Correspondence During Registration
Check your state’s RIA registration requirements
GET YOUR CHECKLIST ↗
Compliance Foundations
Stressed about being your firm’s CCO? With Compliance Foundations, our expert consultants will help you register your firm, lay the foundation for your compliance program, and boost your confidence in your first year.
Not sure which package is right for you? Choose Standard Compliance Foundations if you're looking for structured training and support over your first year to ensure your year one compliance program is efficient and effective. Choose Enhanced Compliance Foundations if you’re looking for greater flexibility in ad-hoc compliance support like additional State or SEC registrations, adding or removing IARs, and discussing general compliance questions, in addition to developing your firm’s compliance program.
Standard Compliance Foundations
$6,150
Monthly payment option: $564/mo for 12 months
Enhanced Compliance Foundations
$10,250
Monthly payment option: $933/mo for 12 months

Compliance for Established Firms
Comprehensive compliance solutions for your existing RIA
Tier 1
Dedicated Compliance Advisor
$575 / MO
Choose this tier for proactive, expert-led compliance support where XYPN is your Dedicated Compliance Advisor.
Quarterly check-ins
Ad-hoc 1:1 compliance support calls*
Compliance document reviews and updates
3 additional state registrations and 3 IARs per year†
Audit prep and post-audit support
Direct ad-hoc email support
Tier 2
Compliance Program Manager
$1,000 SETUP + $1,200 / MO
Choose this tier to get customized compliance support and hand off recurring tasks to XYPN as your Compliance Program Manager.
Tier 1 support
Support completing recurring supervision tasks related to:
Advertising
Billing
Suitability
Contract Execution
Email Supervision
Quarterly compliance review reports
Tier 3
Integrated Compliance Partner
$1,000 SETUP + 2,000 / MO
Choose this tier and get expanded compliance oversight with XYPN as your Integrated Compliance Partner, plus 1:1 support throughout audits.
Tier 1 & 2 support
Compliance management review:
Employee trade monitoring
Vendor due-diligence
Firm-wide risk assessments
13F & 13H EDGAR Filings
Optional on-site visits every 12-24
months**
Virtual or on-site audit support
New employee compliance onboarding and training
Let's get started →
* Up to 12 hours of support per year as needed
** Subject to additional travel costs
† Additional compliance support billed at $360/hour in quarter hour increments. The Compliance team will notify the Adviser, before the start of a requested project, anytime the requested project, task, or assignment requires separate billing
Periodic Compliance Service Engagements
À La Carte Compliance Support
Pricing based on support needed
Pricing by Service
While our Ongoing Compliance Consulting offering provides proactive support that scales with your firm, we recognize that each firm has unique needs and some only need support from a compliance expert when a specific issue arises. Through XYPN's Premium Compliance Service offering, you can request ad hoc compliance support on tasks ranging from disclosure document updates and additional State and/or SEC registration filings, as well as hourly consults, compliance program reviews, and mock audit support. Pricing varies by request type and scope.
Hourly Consulting
$360 / HOUR
Expert compliance support on an as needed basis
Advertising & marketing reviews
Compliance document reviews
State or SEC audit support
1:1 consulting to address specific compliance questions
Let's get started →
Looking to learn more about compliance?
WE’VE GOT A GUIDE FOR THAT
We know firsthand what a bear compliance can be on your own. That's why we've created resources to help financial advisors learn to navigate compliance with confidence.

XYPN Makes it Possible
XYPN is the only advisor support platform that makes it possible for independent, fee-only financial planners to build the firm of their dreams with complete autonomy. We do this through ongoing advocacy and access to education and training, curated technology, compliance support, like-minded community, and back-office and client support services.
